title: Bachelor of Science in Artificial Intelligence in Robotics and Intelligent Systems
content: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc) Artificial Intelligence In Robotics and Intelligent Systems Department of Artificial Intelligence Programme Level Under Graduate Duration 4 Years Eligibility Fee Structure Program Structure Programme Specific Outcomes (PSOs) Programme Educational Objectives About the Programme Eligibility Minimum 50% marks in Class 12th in any stream Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list NOTE-Specializations: - Option to pursue with Research (Research Project in Final Year) or without Research. Fee Structure Duration 4 Years Tuition Fee (per annum) 1,10,000 Exam Fee (per annum) 20,000 Medical Insurance (Per Annum) 650 Caution Money (One Time Payment ) 2000 Student ID Card 1000 Program Structure Programme Educational Objectives 01 Holistic Knowledge and Lifelong Learning: Graduates will possess a solid foundation in Artificial Intelligence principles, data science, and computational techniques, enabling them to adapt to emerging technologies and continue lifelong learning in both professional and personal pursuits. 02 Multidisciplinary and Industry-Relevant Skills: Graduates will integrate knowledge across disciplines, combining computer science, mathematics, statistics, and domain-specific knowledge, to solve complex real-world problems and contribute effectively to the AI industry, research, and entrepreneurship. 03 Ethical and Social Responsibility: Graduates will demonstrate ethical behaviour, cultural sensitivity, and social responsibility while applying AI solutions, ensuring that their work positively impacts society and upholds the values of inclusivity and sustainability. 04 Leadership and Innovation: Graduates will develop strong communication, collaboration, and leadership skills, enabling them to contribute innovatively to the AI ecosystem, foster startups, and lead diverse teams in dynamic global work environments. Programme Specific Outcomes (PSOs) 01 Apply AI Techniques and Tools: Develop and implement AI solutions using techniques such as machine learning, deep learning, natural language processing, and computer vision, utilizing modern programming languages and software tools. 02 Data-Driven Decision Making: Analyze, interpret, and visualize complex datasets using statistical and computational methods to derive actionable insights for informed decision-making across various domains. APPLY NOW
